underlying_goal: Address Cursor Bugbot PR review comments across two PRs by renaming overly-specific alert names, fixing interpolation issues, improving duration formatting, and pushing changes
friction_detail: Claude had to redo work after being on the wrong branch, and locale files used wrong interpolation syntax (%{} instead of {{}}) which Claude didn't catch initially.
brief_summary: User wanted Cursor Bugbot PR review comments addressed across two PRs including renaming alerts, fixing duration display, and correcting i18n interpolation — Claude made the changes iteratively with minor friction around branch switching and interpolation syntax.
